getIdentity(address).notice: Returns the full identity struct for a wallet

getTier(address).notice: Returns the KYC tier for a wallet

isValid(address).notice: Checks if a wallet has a valid, active, non-expired identity

registerIdentity(address,uint8,bytes32).notice: Registers a new identity for a wallet

revokeIdentity(address).notice: Revokes the identity for a wallet
